subtitle: Read-only composition of the four desktop auditors + PR-Conflict-Resolver report
snapshot_note: These are READ-ONLY, embedded snapshots of each auditor's output. The console never runs the underlying generators live: audit_automation_surface_v1.py (behind the Registry / Motor Validator) writes a receipt into the repo's tracked receipts/ dir every time it runs, so live execution would mutate a tracked directory. Snapshotting keeps the console deterministic and side-effect-free.

auditors.title: Receipt Ledger Auditor
auditors.detail: No cross-motor clusters found in the collision window; every scanned receipt has a resolvable date. Receipt-family rollup was not captured in this snapshot.

auditors.title: Registry / Motor Validator
auditors.detail: Snapshot only. The underlying audit_automation_surface_v1.py writes a receipt into the tracked receipts/ dir on every run, so the console does NOT execute it live — doing so would mutate a tracked directory (append-only / NO-LIVE lock).

auditors.title: Staleness Gate Auditor
auditors.detail: Two blockers are missing_read_surface for docs in sibling venture repos (SourceA, TrustField-Technologies). If those repos are not checked out on this machine they may be false blockers — verify the paths before treating them as real staleness.

auditors.title: PR-Conflict-Resolver Report
auditors.detail: The bundled report.html is a static, externally-styled (CDN font + sheetjs) 'Eval Review' page. Its computed counts were not extracted into this snapshot, so its tiles render UNPOPULATED rather than 0/CLEAN. Open the source report.html for the full interactive view.

autonomy_tiers.name: Read-only auditor view
autonomy_tiers.note: This console — look, don't touch. No repo mutation.

autonomy_tiers.name: Operator-triggered gate run
autonomy_tiers.note: A human runs the underlying gate (writes its own receipt) outside this console.

autonomy_tiers.name: Scheduled unattended gate loop
autonomy_tiers.note: Proof-gated — requires receipt-backed cycle evidence before enablement.

autonomy_tiers.name: Autonomous remediation
autonomy_tiers.note: Proof-gated — no autonomy or guaranteed-outcome claim is made here.
